rulings.Case Title: JAMES FAHEY VS. SELECT PORTFOLIO SERVICING, INC.
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Defendant Select Portfolio Servicing, Inc.S Notice Of Motion And Motion For Summary Judgment Or, In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Aug 22, 2019 line 1. DEFENDANT SELECT PORTFOLIO SERVICING, INC. MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Defendant Select Portfolio Servicing, Inc.S Notice Of Motion And Motion For Summary Judgment Or, In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication Motion for Summary Judgment is DENIED. Motion for Summary Adjudication of the First cause of action is DENIED. A triable issue of fact exists whether as of January 31, 2015 Plaintiff's payments were the equivalent of full three months payments behind. Further, Defendant failed to shift the burden re: being liable under 2012 HAMP Modification Agreement. Motion for Summary Adjudication is framed by the pleadings. Plaintiff clearly asserts the basis for Defendant's liability as successor to the original contracting party (Fourth Amended Complaint Attachment BC-1 1:14-17). Defendant failed to provide any facts or evidence on this issue other that pointing out that it was not the signatory to the contract, an argument not advanced or pursued by the Plaintiff. Motion for Summary Adjudication is GRANTED as to all other causes of action. These causes of action, as alleged, arise out of events occurring in October 2014-January 2015, more specifically alleged agreements reached/promises made in December 2014. It is undisputed that Plaintiff did not comply with at least one of the terms of such agreements, i.e. did not make a payment due on February 1, 2015. While this payment may be irrelevant (as asserted by Plaintiff, but not decided by the Court at this time) to the 2012 HAMP cause of action, it is an admitted term of the alleged contract/promise, which has not been complied with. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: HENRY CHAN ET AL VS. MARK W. TSANG ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Disqualify Defendants' Attorney Of Record
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Aug 22, 2019 line 2. PLAINTIFF HENRY CHAN, FELICIA GEE Notice Of Motion And Motion To Disqualify Defendants' Attorney Of Record DENIED. There is no basis for disqualification under the facts of this case. See Declarations of Mr. Chan and Mr. Cooc. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: KENNETH C. CHI ET AL VS. OUTSTANDING PROPERTY SOLUTIONS, LLC ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Aug 22, 2019 line 4. CROSS DEFENDANT LTA INVESTMENTS, INC. DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT SUSTAINED with leave to amend. Cross-Complainant shall have 30 days to file an amended cross-complaint alleging in good faith each element of each cause of action as to the moving cross-defendant. Counsel for Cross-Complaint is ordered to comply with CCP 431.40 in future, including the filing of the requisite declaration. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: DEBORAH COLLIER-TUCKER VS. MATT PECK ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Defendant Devine Hardys Responses To Set One Of Plaintiff Request For Production Of Documents, And Request To Deem As Admitted Request For Admissions Set One And Sanctions In The Amount Of $1,370.00;
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Aug 22, 2019 line 6. PLAINTIFF DEBORAH COLLIER-TUCKER Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Defendant Devine Hardys Responses To Set One Of Plaintiff Request For Production Of Documents, And Request To Deem As Admitted Request For Admissions Set One And Sanctions In The Amount Of $1,370.00 GRANTED, subject to opposition. Devine Hardy to Provide complete verified responses to Request for Production Set One within 5 days of entry of order. Admissions (Set One) are deemed admitted. Sanctions granted in the amount of $660. = (501/CFH)
